brief_justification: Paper A is a measure-theoretic path-space analysis of stochastic processes — conditional factorisation of path laws detected via Radon-Nikodym/Girsanov changes of measure and relative-entropy (conditional mutual information), tied to stochastic optimal control and Schrodinger bridges. Paper B is observational cosmology: constraining a decaying-graviton Dark Dimension dark-matter scenario with CMB+BAO data and Stage-IV survey forecasts. There is no shared governing process or role-for-role correspondence — the only faint overlap is the generic word 'statistical', so the machinery differs entirely.
